message:
I’ll never forget the time I decided to go full-on ‘gloriously over-prepared’ for a winter storm. I stocked up on snacks, filled every water jug in the house, and even made a mini supply kit that could rival a small outdoor store! My family teased me, but when the snow started piling up and the power went out, I felt like a hero with my cozy stash of goodies and candles. 😄

Sometimes, being a bit over-prepared can be more of a blessing than a burden. It’s like giving yourself a warm hug when the winds start howling outside. 

Has anyone else ever gone a little overboard with their emergency prep? What’s your favorite ‘just in case’ item? This little refresher helped me keep my calm in the storm!
